review_notes: The functions accurately map to cryptographic controls in Kubernetes. The naming is mostly consistent with the pattern, but minor improvements can be made for clarity. All functions are technically correct and applicable to Kubernetes security controls.
naming_improvements: Consider changing 'k8s_apiserver_tls_enabled' to 'k8s_apiserver_tls_encryption_enabled' for consistency with other encryption-related function names.
title: Cryptographic Controls
step1_reasoning: The ISO27001 A.10.1 control focuses on cryptographic controls which are directly applicable to Kubernetes in several areas. Encryption at rest for etcd and Kubernetes Secrets ensures data confidentiality. TLS for ingress controllers and API server communications ensures data in transit is encrypted, aligning with cryptographic control requirements.
